keys.title: Sign in
keys.descriptionDefault: Sign in with the email registered for your workspace.
keys.descriptionEmailLocked: We'll send a verification code to this address to sign in.
keys.descriptionPackageFunnel: Sign in or create an account to continue to payment.
keys.descriptionPortalPassword: Enter your email. We will send a verification code, then you can create your service administrator password.
keys.descriptionLoginGate: Sign in with your email and password. We will email a verification code next.
